workloads.source: (loop [i 0 acc 0] (if (< i 5000) (recur (+ i 1) (+ acc (mod i 17))) acc))
(loop [i 0 acc 0] (if (< i 2500) (recur (+ i 1) ((fn [x] (+ x 1)) acc)) acc))
(loop [i 0 acc 0] (if (< i 500) (recur (+ i 1) (+ acc (nth [1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8] (mod i 8)))) acc))
(loop [i 0 value {}] (if (< i 500) (recur (+ i 1) (assoc value i (+ i 1))) (get value 499)))
